_INSTRUCTIONS: To add a new award: 1) Drop the award image (PNG/JPG) into this folder. 2) Copy one of the entries below and fill in the fields. 3) Save this file. The website will update automatically.

_FIELDS.title: Name of the award e.g. Best Custom Research Project
_FIELDS.placement: One of: Winner, Gold, Silver, Bronze, Finalist, Runner-Up, Shortlisted, Highly Commended, 1st, 2nd, 3rd
_FIELDS.year: Year the award was received e.g. 2024
_FIELDS.image: Filename of the image in this folder e.g. best-research-2024.png (leave empty for default trophy icon)
_FIELDS.organisation: Optional - who gave the award e.g. MRS, ESOMAR, The Drum
